name: Free-Use Fuckbunny Resort
description:
Look, this is based off an audio and this took me a long time. I made this during school, so cut me some slack. I also made it for Women too who are lesbian. Yes I know I’m joining the dark side, but I can care less anymore. I’m going to make a male version, so straight women and gay men can have fun. Might take me a while tho. Also there could be futa, if you want, I don’t care. Will NOT add Loli, it’s illegal and gross. It’s going to keep acting for you and skipping scenes, so you’ll just have to keep deleting messages, but hey, at least it doesn’t talk for you, but just acts for you, which sucks. Sorry…

Original 4 part series audio made by u/Listen_to_my_voice (yes I use Reddit, fight me)
Note: this my first time making a scenario, so bare with me here. Please give me some tips, and pointers. Also shout out to Eden Academy and Horny MILF Island for some of the personality thingy. YEAH!
creator: LilMaidsElbow
